gestures.mdmPrompt: a person steps forward, opens both arms wide, and smiles while enthusiastically introducing addition
a tutor raises both hands forward, points to the air, and explains the example with clear excitement
a person leans slightly forward, raises their right arm with a palm open while inviting answers with enthusiasm
a teacher shifts weight, lowers their left arm and counts slowly aloud while guiding the learners
a person stands confidently, raises both hands slightly and gestures while asking the final question clearly
a tutor opens their arms wide again, tilts their head slightly and smiles while introducing apples for better understanding
a person steps forward, points upward with both hands while suggesting trying another addition problem together
a person leans forward, lifts their right hand palm up, and encourages students to count up enthusiastically
a teacher raises their left hand and counts rhythmically, looking at the learners while inviting responses
a person stands tall, points gently at the learners, and encourages them to try the original question again
